examples: He has set himself up as a crusader for higher press and broadcasting standards.
A crusader leader had promised them protection. He meant it.
Mr Spitzer, by contrast, is relishing his role as a crusader against "special interests".
Or hit the party-filled port city of Bodrum, where cruise ships dock near a Crusader castle.
The self-propelled artillery system was called Crusader, and the armed scout helicopter was called Comanche.
